Video.summary: From Red River to Rio Bravo, outlaws and legends collide in some of the greatest Westerns ever made.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Dollars to Django and beyond, Italian westerns captured the frontier with style, scale, and unforgettable antiheroes.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These Hollywood Westerns looked beyond legend, showing audiences the harsh reality of frontier conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: High-octane tales of rebels, renegades, and road warriors burning rubber on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From satirical comedies to intense dramas, these war movies capture the chaos, tragedy, and complexity of conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hollywood's greatest heroes fight history's greatest battles in this classic war film collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 2: The Fight for Freedom
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Revisit an epic collection of war films that capture the bravery, sacrifice, and cost of conflict.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 3: Triumph and Turmoil
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These gripping war films explore the chaos, complexity, and moral ambiguity of conflict on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 4: The Fog of War
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Two American soldiers must put aside their differences in order to survive on a remote island after they are attacked by Japanese forces in World War II.
Video.title: Battle of Blood Island

Video.summary: From Bullitt to Bad Lieutenant, filmmakers discuss cops that kick ass on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the past to the future, laying down the law comes easy to these big screen cops!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gunman (Jack Palance) makes a fatal mistake when he and his gang ravage a town and murder the local priest (Lee Van Cleef). Now, the priest’s twin brother vows revenge, and teams with a local boy (Leif Garrett) to bring the gunman and his gang to their knees. Lee Van Cleef played dual roles in this 1977 Spaghetti Western produced by Golan-Globus Productions.
Video.title: God's Gun

Video.summary: Take a closer look at the classic films of William Friedkin, Brian De Palma, and John Carpenter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: Get rowdy with Big Trouble in Little China, Rambo, Dirty Harry, Mad Max, and more kick ass movies!
Video.title: ACTION!!! Vol. 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers discuss iconic cult classics The Warriors, Innerspace, and more!
Video.title: ACTION!!! Vol. 2

Video.summary: Hollywood filmmakers discuss Assault on Precinct 13, Sorcerer, Escape from New York, Runaway Train, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's time to load up and throw down with these decade-spanning action favorites!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These hard-hitting action flicks are packed with daring heists, gritty gunplay, and unforgettable heroes.
Video.grandparentTitle: ACTION!!! Vol. 5: Grit, Guns, and Getaways
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Five films. One legacy. Here's why Clint Eastwood's Harry Callahan is a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Three directors. Three unique styles. Three incredible legacies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These heist and detective classics explore the moral ambiguity and dark psychology of the criminal underworld.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 1: The Criminal Code
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's an action bonanza of cops, robbers, and vengeance in these crime and exploitation hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 2: Grit and Glory
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Betrayal, justice, and moral complexity are on the menu in these moody and violent crime flicks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 3: The Dark Side of Justice
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Loyalty, vengeance, and justice collide in these Western hits starring Glenn Ford, Steve McQueen, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A disheveled and occasionally drunk police detective must sober up in time to stop the mob from smuggling stolen heroin into Los Angeles.
Video.title: Mitchell

Video.summary: A Hollywood star racing to fund his dream film finds himself battling a ruthless gang determined to shut down the production.
Video.title: Hollywood Man

Video.summary: Sonny Chiba stars as a mercenary martial arts master who must protect an oil tycoon’s daughter from an army of murderous thugs.
Video.title: The Street Fighter
